title: Commonworld public globe follow-up hardening
goal: Preserve the first live public MapLibre globe as a verified baseline while separately proving accessibility behavior and deciding the production delivery and basemap-provider boundary without overstating the current slice.
completion: Android-specific reduced-motion behavior is either physically proven against an exact Commonworld commit or remains an explicit nonclaim with a precise blocker.
Screen-reader product support is tested with a named physical assistive-technology path and bounded to the platforms actually covered.
Production delivery architecture and basemap-provider responsibility are explicitly authorized or deferred with SLA, privacy, cost, attribution, fallback and monitoring consequences visible.
The live public globe remains regression-tested and no follow-up claim is inferred from the successful PR #66 release alone.

baseline_proven: physical Android Chrome PASS for all 18 required checks
main CI and GitHub Pages deployment PASS
public runtime asset hashes match the reviewed merge tree
metadata.queue_policy: Tasks are registered as planned and are not automatically added to registry/queue.json.
